header.title: Publish data asset
header.subtitle: Publish an asset in the data space on behalf of the organization. Choose a URL or IPFS source.

alerts.securityNote: ProcureData does not store your data. We only facilitate the secure connection between your API and the authorized consumer.

step1.title: Data source
step1.description: Select the source type and configure the connection

step2.title: Asset metadata
step2.description: Descriptive information about the data asset
step2.schemaDescription: Define the structure that consumers will see when querying your API
step2.uploadHint: Upload an example JSON or CSV file and we will automatically detect the fields. You can also define them manually.

descriptionField.label: Description (optional)
descriptionField.placeholder: Describe the content and usefulness of the data...

step3.title: Pontus-X Access Policies
step3.description: Define governance rules and conditions of use for your dataset

odrl.permissionsTitle: Permissions — What the user CAN do
odrl.prohibitionsTitle: Prohibitions — What the user CANNOT do

termsAndConditions.label: Link to Terms and Conditions (Optional)
termsAndConditions.hint: Enter a resolvable URL to your legal T&C document

accessConfig.title: Access configuration
accessConfig.whitelistDescription: If you add organizations here, the asset becomes PRIVATE. Only they will be able to see and request it. The denied list will be ignored automatically.
accessConfig.whitelistEmptyStatus: No organizations added — the asset will not be private by whitelist.
accessConfig.blacklistDescription: Only effective if the allowed list is empty. The asset will be PUBLIC for everyone, except for the organizations listed here.
accessConfig.blacklistEmptyStatus: No organizations denied — total public access.
accessConfig.serviceExpiryDescription: Define how long the consumer can access the data before their license expires.
accessConfig.serviceExpiryHint: Default value: 90 days. Consumers will see this period in the license of use.
accessConfig.usersAllowedHint: Optional. Leave blank to allow public access (no restrictions).
accessConfig.walletsDeniedHint: To block wallets of unregistered persons/companies.

step4.title: Publication
step4.description: Define how your dataset will appear in the catalog

descriptionField.label: Description
descriptionField.placeholder: Describe the content, sources and utility of the data...

pricingModel.title: Pricing Model
pricingModel.description: Define how you want to monetize your data

step4.instruction: Choose the wallet to sign with and press Publish to register the asset on blockchain.

termsOfUse.title: Terms of Use
termsOfUse.description: Accept the conditions to publish in the marketplace
termsOfUse.checkbox1: I accept the ProcureData Terms and Conditions
termsOfUse.checkbox1Subtitle: Including obligations as a data provider and marketplace usage policies.
termsOfUse.checkbox2: I confirm that I have the right to share this data
termsOfUse.checkbox2Subtitle: I declare that the data complies with GDPR and does not contain personal information without consent.

wallet.label: Wallet for publishing
wallet.noOrgWallets: This organization has no registered wallets. Register a wallet for the organization to publish.
